description: When enabled, each order is saved as a draft (no GL or stock impact). All drafts are submitted in batch when the session is closed.
label: Consolidate Invoice on Close

description: Hashed PIN for POS session authentication
label: POS PIN (hashed)
name: User-custom_pos_pin_hash

description: Manual transaction exchange rate used for LBP/USD dual-currency display.
label: Exchange Rate Override (LBP/USD)

description: Manual transaction exchange rate used for LBP/USD dual-currency display.
label: Exchange Rate Override (LBP/USD)

description: Manual transaction exchange rate used for LBP/USD dual-currency display.

description: Manual transaction exchange rate used for LBP/USD dual-currency display.

label: Ignore write off on Partial Returns
name: POS Profile-custom_ignore_write_off_on_partial_returns

description: Thermal receipt print format used by the Sultan POS SPA

label: POS Print Template (Arabic)

description: Allow cashiers to accept payment in a secondary currency (e.g., LBP alongside USD).
label: Enable Multi-Currency
name: POS Profile-custom_enable_multi_currency

description: Units of secondary currency per 1 unit of base currency (e.g., 89500 if 1 USD = 89,500 LBP).
label: Exchange Rate (Secondary per Base)
name: POS Profile-custom_exchange_rate

label: Allow Cashier to Edit Exchange Rate
name: POS Profile-custom_allow_edit_exchange_rate
description: When enabled, cashiers can update the exchange rate live in the Payment Processing dialog.

label: Accepted Currencies
name: POS Profile-custom_multi_currency_rates
description: Define all accepted secondary currencies and their exchange rates.

label: Clear Draft Invoices on Closing Shift
name: POS Profile-custom_clear_draft_invoices

description: Unique username the employee uses to log in at the POS terminal
label: POS Username
name: Employee-custom_pos_username

description: Amount in the secondary currency (e.g. USD)
label: Amount in Payment Currency
